description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with a single wide, white reflective stripe around its upper midsection. The cone is constructed from a flexible, durable material, likely rubber or PVC, and shows significant signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and fading, especially on the white stripe. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, tapering smoothly to a point. The base is hexagonal, broad, and thick, providing stability and weight to prevent tipping, and it appears to be made of a denser material than the cone itself. The surface is matte and grippy, with visible grime and roughness from outdoor use. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible anywhere on the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with a single wide, dirty white reflective stripe and a thick, hexagonal base. The surface is matte, scuffed, and shows signs of heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: The cone is seen from a slightly angled front, showing the dirty white stripe and the scuffed, wide hexagonal base.
description_view_1: This view is nearly head-on, emphasizing the symmetry of the cone and the even wear on the reflective stripe and base.
description_view_2: The cone is rotated, revealing more grime and scuffing on the base and a slightly different pattern of dirt on the stripe.
description_view_3: Another angled view, highlighting the rough, dirty surface of the base and the consistent wear around the cone.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, white reflective stripe encircles the upper midsection of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is hexagonal, thick, and wide, made of dense material for stability, with visible scuff marks and a rough, dirty texture.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, fading, and grime from heavy outdoor use.
